zh.Chateaumur, Pouzauges, Vendee, Fr: 法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易波代a奧馬爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thibault II de CHABOT於1100年5月18日出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易波代武瓦特時，他的父親Sebran I CHABOT26歲，母親Agnès de La Grève Dame de la Roche-Serviere27歲。他於1129年與Marguerite Loubet在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易波代a奧馬爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1180年9月17日在法國努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安利莫格斯享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thibault II de CHABOT于1100年5月18日出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易波代武瓦特时，他的父亲Sebran I CHABOT26岁，母亲Agnès de La Grève Dame de la Roche-Serviere27岁。他于1129年与Marguerite Loubet在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易波代a奧馬爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1180年9月17日在法国努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安利莫格斯享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: CHABOT
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Pierre, Adrien, Armand, Jacques, Lucien, Emilien, Fernand, Gaetan, Laurent, Normand.
habitational name from any of several places called (Le) Chabot, from caput ‘head, summit’.

nameMeanings.name: Thibault
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Thibault II de CHABOT was born on 18 May 1100, in Vouvant, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Sebran I CHABOT, was 26 and his mother, Agnès de La Grève Dame de la Roche-Serviere, was 27. He married Marguerite Loubet in 1129, in Châteaumur, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 17 September 1180, in Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thibault II de CHABOT est né le 18 mai 1100, à Vouvant, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Sebran I CHABOT, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agnès de La Grève Dame de la Roche-Serviere, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Marguerite Loubet en 1129, à Châteaumur, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 17 septembre 1180, à Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thibault II de CHABOT am 18. Mai 1100 in Vouvant, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sebran I CHABOT 26 und seine Mutter Agnès de La Grève Dame de la Roche-Serviere 27. Er hat 1129 in Châteaumur, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich Marguerite Loubet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 17. September 1180 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thibault II de CHABOT è nato il il 18 maggio 1100 nel Vouvant, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, Francia, il suo padre, Sebran I CHABOT, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Agnès de La Grève Dame de la Roche-Serviere, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Marguerite Loubet nel 1129, nel Châteaumur, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 17 settembre 1180, nel Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thibault II de CHABOTが1100年5月18日にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーベンドeボウヴァントで生まれた時，父Sebran I CHABOTは26歳，母Agnès de La Grève Dame de la Roche-Serviereは27歳であった。1129年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーベンドeチaテアウムルでMarguerite Loubetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1180年9月17日にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインハウテ-ヴィエンリモジェズで80歳で死去した。

ko.Vouvant,85305,Vendée,Pays de la Loire,FR: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 븐드e 보우반트
ko.Chateaumur, Pouzauges, Vendee, Fr: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 븐드e cha테오머
ko.lifeSummary: Thibault II de CHABOT(이)가 1100년 5월 18일 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 븐드e 보우반트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sebran I CHABOT(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnès de La Grève Dame de la Roche-Serviere(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1129년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 븐드e cha테오머에서 Marguerite Loubet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1180년 9월 17일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 하테-비니 리모그스에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thibault II de CHABOT nasceu em 18 de maio de 1100, em Vouvant, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Sebran I CHABOT, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Agnès de La Grève Dame de la Roche-Serviere, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Marguerite Loubet em 1129, em Châteaumur, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de setembro de 1180, em Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, com 80 anos.

ru.Chateaumur, Pouzauges, Vendee, Fr: чaтомур, вендe, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thibault II de CHABOT родился 18 мая 1100 г. в местности фоувант, вендe, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Sebran I CHABOT было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnès de La Grève Dame de la Roche-Serviere, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Marguerite Loubet в 1129 г. в местности чaтомур, вендe, пеис де ла лоир, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 17 сентября 1180 г. в местности лимогесь, хауте-виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 80 лет.

Se casó con Marguerite Loubet en 1129, en Châteaumur, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 17 de septiembre de 1180, en Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 80 años.
